name: shaking-hands
prompt: Close-up on trembling hands with silver rings. Rings clinking together. Grounding technique failing. Echo still resonating through body. Unsteady. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: broken-warning
prompt: Medium shot androgynous figure with auburn hair. Breathing hard, voice cracking visible in expression. Composure shattered. Amber still bleeding into green eyes. Concrete corridor behind, warm amber lighting. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Jace
dialogue.text: The warning is delivered. Stay away from her.

bubble: Speech from Jace, medium shot face center of frame, place bubble TOP avoiding face
